feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Customizing Tools
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Customizing Tools Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Taking huge heap memory by SAP JCO library
entry.content:
we are seeing java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space in SAP Java connector. After analyzing heap dumps, we came to know is, for 278 MB file, jco is taking around 2GB heap memory. 

For 400 mb file, it taking around 3.2GB.

1. We need to know if the Idoc file is having x size , how much approximate memory required (2x, 4x,6x,8x,10x) to process this file using java program.

For example, if the Idoc file is 100 MB, do we need around 400/600/800 MB of java heap  memory to process the file.

2. Is there anyway by which java application will get to know the file size using SapJCO api before start processing/reading file?

Error:

One instance of “com.sap.conn.rfc.data.ARFCSDATA” loaded by “com.test.$Loader @ 0x60129d7a8” occupies 2,790.48 MB (34.17%) bytes. The memory is accumulated in one instance of “char[][]”, loaded by “<system class loader>”, which occupies 2,790.47 MB (34.17%) bytes.

entry.title: Re: sap hana certification
entry.content:
Hi @SaiPriyanka 
Please access the C_HAMOD SAP Certified Associate - Data Engineer - SAP HANA certification site.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How to leverage single Emarsys account for multibrand solution?
entry.content:
Hi Juan!

That is a great question. For Web Extend, there are two things you need to pay attention to - which contact ID you use to identify customers, and your product catalog. Web Extend can happily track customers across different sites if there is a universal ID. And as long as the products they are viewing are consistent (i.e. they share a product catalog), then the product recommendations and so on will all work fine.

In other words, tracking contacts across multiple domains (e.g. regional or localised) for the same brand pose no trouble for Web Extend. And you can use tags to differentiate which website is being viewing, if you want.  

But if the different domains have different brands, with different products, then we would always strongly recommend having an Emarsys account for each brand. Otherwise Web Extend will be tracking behaviour relating to different sets of products, and cannot provide the same insights.

Since Web Extend is quite flexible, and every business has its own challenges, I would always tell customers to speak to their Success Manager to evaluate which option is the best for them. Even if the answer is to have separate Emarsys accounts, you can still use the Unified Account Reporting to bring all the responses together in one place.

Hope that explains it a little...

entry.title: Re: Goods issue to sampling from QI in /SCWM/ADGI posting...

are you able to solve the issue for sample consumption 331 for EWM lots? i am also facing same issue, if you found solution let us know

entry.title: Re: More than one approver person on Projects
entry.content:
Hi Feras.

Sorry, but how this helps to make a solution of multiple approvers for one project?

entry.title: Re: how to use Enum attribute in simple search
entry.content:
This is not possible as the non atomic attributes are omitted in simple search. Look at the AbstractSearchController class's isApplicableForSimpleSearch method:

protected boolean isApplicableForSimpleSearch(String typeCode, String fieldName) {
    DataAttribute attribute = this.typeFacade.getAttribute(typeCode, fieldName);
    if (attribute == null) {
        LOG.warn("Could not load DataAttribute for field [{}] of type [{}]", fieldName, typeCode);
        return false;
    } else if (!attribute.getDefinedType().isAtomic()) {
        LOG.warn("SimpleSearch configured incorrectly for type [{}]. Non-atomic field [{}] has been omitted", typeCode, fieldName);
        return false;
    } else {
        return true;
    }
}

entry.title: Particula GL is Not picking the cost center
entry.content: While Posting MIGO entry against The PO Particular GL Cost center is not Picking could you plz any one can help me?

entry.title: Clean Up Unused Salesforce Input Key Figures - SAP IBP
entry.content:
Hi all, 

We currently have 71 key figures in IBP related to Salesforce demand, covering quantity and revenue inputs, but we only need 4; Constrained Qty, Unconstrained Qty, Constrained Rev, Unconstrained Rev.

Currently; 71 key figures pertaining to Salesforce data, but we only need 4 of those.  Would also like to create 2 new ones for Constrained Cost and Unconstrained Cost.

Any inputs on clean up on unused Salesforce key figures?

entry.title: Security standard for Application to DB connectivity
entry.content:
Dear Team,

The audit team wants information from SAP about DB data security. They also want to know what type of encryption is used in the application for DB connectivity.

Is there any solution for application security, DB security?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Security standard for Application to DB connectivity
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please check below note about the data security and encryption of Oracle database:

974876 - Oracle Transparent Data Encryption (TDE)

Best regards,
SAP Product Support

entry.title: I have a requirement to get the pop-up notification for MIRO Invoice
entry.content:
Business scenario:

in case of cross company STO PO we get the warning message into SAP GUI but in Fiori app how to set up warning message pop up?

Currently I am getting warning message but not getting pop up. Business user requirement is instead of clicking on warning he should get warning message pop up after enters PO n umber into MIRO so even user forget to check messages still due to pop up its easy for user to see pop up and act accordingly.

message: Cross-company code transaction in PO item XXXX  00010, company code 1000

Message no. M8393

Kindly suggest how to activate pop up while using S4 HABA Web GUI and using Fiori App for MIRO.

entry.title: hardware code null ，when user sap*
entry.content: restore slm systyem from suse12 to Suse15sp5,(backup db)

entry.title: SAP BTP Process Automation how to Extract Invoice Details
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm trying to build my first process in SAP BTP Build Process Automation following the Tutorial 

Invoice Processing and Approval Using SAP Build Process Automation

The problem is in my developer environment I'm missing the option to add the "Document Template"

I also checked the dependencies that the Document Information Extraction SDK was added to my project

Would be great if someone could get me back on track.

Thank you 

Andreas

entry.title: Config Panel user attributes doesn't download in SSAM 2310
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 We have implemented SSAM 2310 with Maintenance Technician Persona, In Config Panel, we have configured  Mobile user Attributes   to download Function Location  (Admin Panel). But the configuration is not picking the values assigned in Admin panel and downloading all the data.

We want to download the functional locations only related to the plant configured, as of now its not been considered and all the functional locations are getting downloaded into the device.

entry.title: Variant configuration-dependencies not shown if characteristic does not have a value
entry.content:
Hello,
We have some characteristics in our variant configurator which have no entry required (it is not mandatory to define a value).

However, if no value is inserted, the dependencies linked to them do not work

Ex. The characteristic WM_INFEED has the possible values:

 

 If not value is chosen during the configuration, the dependency below does not give back any value (WM_INFEED checks that the value is different from something)

WM_MODELLO = 'RA' AND
WM_INFEED <> 'ROTATING_BELT_INFEED' AND
(WM_SERIE = 'V4' OR
WM_SERIE = 'V8')

We have many dependencies in this situation.
Is it possible to find a solution which does not require modifying all the dependencies or make mandatory inserting a value manually?

Thanks,

entry.title: SAP Signavio Internal infrastructure Error/ Faild to fetch Error in Loading the Data
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am currently getting this Error Masssage during my ETL in the loading part: 

"Infrastructure error: Internal infrastructure error: Failed to fetch the list of unload files via S3 API."

Any Ideas on how to fix the issue? 

Regards Niels

entry.title: Issue in downloading PO in SSAM 2310 for Inventory Clerk Persona
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have enabled Inventory Clerk Persona in our SSAM 2310 environment and we are  not able to download any Purchase Order, where as the same Purchase order can be downloaded into Inventory Manager application connecting to same backed. We have cross checked the configuration which is standard as no customization is done. We have followed the below link for configuration also

https://help.sap.com/docs/service-asset-manager/sap-service-and-asset-manager-configuration-guide/inventory-clerk-parameter-configuration

As a standard configuration we expect the PO to be downloaded.

We have S4Hana 2020 with SP 02 enabled through TCI note.

Can anyone suggest any missing configs or any additional notes to be implemented for the same

Regards,

Ashwin

entry.title: S_alr_87012179 report output. I am not able to view it as rows and columns
entry.content:
Hi,

For report output s_alr_87012179 in order to view it as rows and columns what should i do?

Thank you,

Alex
